summary: Toasts / Snacks / Undo: unify all 7 notification functions onto the GAM_TOK floating-card shell (surface-panel bg, border-strong, scrim shadow, severity-colored 3px left keyline), introduce one shared .gam-toast-btn dismiss/action treatment, route every hardcoded hex (#1a1c20 #444 #eee #3a2500 #1a1f28 #e8eaed #4A9EFF #2a2a30 #1f4d2e #5a2020 #c6f6d5 #fed7d7 #e5e5e8 #2a1d10 #ffd84d #9b9892 #fff #0a0a0b stray) onto GAM_TOK (inline cssText) or var(--gam-tok-*) (<style> rules), collapse the 3 scattered countdown/progress styles to one accent-line->accent track, map z-literals to the --z-toast tier, and add aria-live to _showUndoToast plus a keyboard-reachable focus-ringed dismiss treatment on every toast button. Inline z-index literals stay numeric (var() forbidden in cssText per PART 2 §2.1) but are documented onto the --z-toast top tier; the injectToastCSS <style> z-index migrates to var(--z-toast).

edits.note: injectToastCSS <style> .gam-toast base -> floating-card shell (transformation #1): surface-panel bg, border-strong, 8px radius, scrim shadow, 8px gap, 3px info left keyline. Removes hex #e5e5e8 #2a2a30 -> var(--gam-tok-*). var() safe (Channel-2 <style>).
injectToastCSS success variant: severity via the shared 3px left keyline (success) instead of full-fill. Removes #1f4d2e #c6f6d5.
injectToastCSS error variant: danger keyline instead of full-fill. Removes #5a2020 #fed7d7.
injectToastCSS info variant: info keyline. Removes #2a2a30 #e5e5e8. Closes the literal-to-zero on the toast-stack <style> block.
Z-hierarchy (transformation #5): map the 99999 literal onto the --z-toast top tier. <style> block, so var(--z-toast) is safe.

showBanUndoToast shell -> GAM_TOK floating card (#1 + #3). #1a1c20->surfacePanel, #eee->ink, #444->borderStrong; warn keyline (undo is a reversible-caution action); 8px radius, scrim shadow, 8px gap, 12/16 pad. Inline z-literal 2147483610 stays numeric (var() forbidden in cssText) -- documented at --z-toast top tier.

showBanUndoToast Undo button -> shared .gam-toast-btn treatment (#2): transparent bg, 1px border, warn-tinted text/border to match the keyline, 32px min target, 6px radius. Routes off var(--bb-amber-cool)/#3a2500. textContent 'Undo' preserved (accessible name). Class adds the focus-ring via the .gam-toast-btn rule.

a11y parity (transformation #6 / acceptance): _showUndoToast omitted aria-live. role=alert is assertive, so aria-live=assertive matches. Anchored on the id+role pair (unique to _showUndoToast) so the new line inserts immediately after the role assignment.

_showUndoToast shell line 1 -> GAM_TOK floating card (#1 + #3). #1a1f28->surfacePanel, #3a3f48->borderStrong; 3px info keyline (informational undo); 4->8px radius. z-index 9999999 (next line up) already = --z-toast value; kept numeric (cssText, var() forbidden).
_showUndoToast shell line 2 -> #e8eaed->GAM_TOK.ink, shadow -> 0 8px 24px scrim (the floating-card scrim shadow).
_showUndoToast shell padding/gap -> the canonical floating-card 12/16 padding + 8px icon-gap (transformation #1). No hex on this line; spacing-only normalization.
_showUndoToast undo button line 1 -> shared .gam-toast-btn look (#2): transparent bg, 1px info border, 6px radius. #4A9EFF->GAM_TOK.info (WCAG-bumped).

_showUndoToast undo button line 2 -> info text matching keyline, 32px min target. #4A9EFF->GAM_TOK.info. undoBtn already calls .focus(); the focus ring resolves via the WP-01 :focus-visible block (and we add .gam-toast-btn-class buttons elsewhere).

One countdown/progress style (transformation #4): unify on the accent fill track at card bottom; #4A9EFF->GAM_TOK.accent, radius 4->8 to match the new card. PRM static fallback handled by the WP-01 global motion cap (neutralizes the width transition).

_gamShowSwRestartSnack shell -> GAM_TOK floating card (#1 + #3). #1a1c20->surfacePanel, #eee->ink, #444->borderStrong; info keyline (connection re-established = informational); 8px radius, scrim shadow, 12/16 pad, 8px gap. Inline z 2147483640 kept numeric, documented at --z-toast tier.

_gamShowSwRestartSnack Retry button -> shared .gam-toast-btn (#2): transparent bg, 1px info border, info text, 32px min target, 6px radius. Routes off #4A9EFF/#fff. Class adds focus-ring (.gam-toast-btn rule). textContent 'Retry' preserved.

edits.oldString: dismissBtn.style.cssText = 'background:transparent;color:#9b9892;border:1px solid #7a7672;border-radius:3px;padding:4px 8px;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap'; /* v.next a11y: border 2.5:1 -> 4.1:1 (UI 3:1 pass) */
edits.note: _gamShowSwRestartSnack Dismiss button -> shared .gam-toast-btn (#2): transparent bg, ink-muted text, border-strong, 32px min target, 6px radius. Routes off #9b9892->inkMuted, #7a7672->borderStrong (keeps/improves the prior a11y contrast bump). Class adds focus-ring. textContent 'Dismiss' preserved.

edits.oldString: b.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:99999999;background:#2a1d10;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bb-amber);color:#ffd84d;font:600 12px/1.4 ui-monospace,JetBrains Mono,monospace;padding:8px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;letter-spacing:0.04em;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.6)';
edits.note: _gamShowExtOrphanedBanner shell -> GAM_TOK (#1 + #3). #2a1d10->surfacePanel, #ffd84d->ink; the top-banner keyline lives on its existing border-bottom -> 3px warn (orphaned ext = caution). var(--bb-amber) border literal -> GAM_TOK.warn; scrim shadow; 12/16 pad. Inline z 99999999 kept numeric (cssText), documented at --z-toast tier.

edits.oldString: '<button id="gam-ext-orphaned-copy" style="background:transparent;border:1px solid #7a7672;color:#ffd84d;padding:4px 10px;cursor:pointer;font:600 10px ui-monospace,monospace;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase" title="Copy debug details to clipboard">📋 Copy</button>' +
edits.newString: '<button id="gam-ext-orphaned-copy" class="gam-toast-btn" style="background:transparent;border:1px solid '+GAM_TOK.borderStrong+';color:'+GAM_TOK.inkMuted+';padding:6px 10px;min-height:32px;cursor:pointer;font:600 10px ui-monospace,monospace;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase" title="Copy debug details to clipboard">📋 Copy</button>' +
edits.note: Orphaned-banner Copy button -> .gam-toast-btn (#2). #7a7672->borderStrong, #ffd84d->inkMuted, 32px min target. id #gam-ext-orphaned-copy preserved (locked). title + text'Copy' preserved. Class adds focus-ring.

Orphaned-banner primary Reload button: solid warn fill + on-accent-dark text per the on-accent split (PART 1 §1.7 black-on-amber passes 9.86:1). var(--bb-amber)->GAM_TOK.warn, #0a0a0b->onAccentDark. 32px min target. id #gam-ext-orphaned-reload preserved. Class adds focus-ring; --warn modifier marks the filled variant.

edits.oldString: '<button id="gam-ext-orphaned-dismiss" style="background:transparent;border:1px solid #7a7672;color:#9b9892;padding:4px 10px;cursor:pointer;font:600 10px ui-monospace,monospace;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase">Dismiss</button>'; /* v.next a11y: border 2.5:1 -> 4.1:1 */
edits.note: Orphaned-banner Dismiss button -> .gam-toast-btn (#2). #7a7672->borderStrong, #9b9892->inkMuted, 32px min target. id #gam-ext-orphaned-dismiss preserved (locked). text'Dismiss' preserved. Class adds focus-ring.

snackWithActions action button -> shared .gam-toast-btn (#2): transparent bg, border-strong, ink-muted text, 32px min target, 6px radius. Routes off rgba(255,255,255,.4)/.15. textContent (action.label) preserved. Class adds focus-ring.

snack() countdown bar -> the single accent progress style (transformation #4). var(--bb-amber)->GAM_TOK.accent (inline cssText: var() forbidden, GAM_TOK required), radius 6->8 to match the unified card. PRM static fallback via the WP-01 global motion cap.

Two changes on a stable anchor: (a) the stray .gam-snack-action:hover literal #0a0a0b -> var(--gam-tok-on-accent-dark); (b) append the new shared .gam-toast-btn family (#2). var() is safe (Channel-2 <style>). The :focus-visible ring is already wired in the WP-01 a11y block (.gam-toast-btn enumerated at the focus-visible selector list), satisfying the 'every toast keyboard-dismissable with visible focus ring' criterion. Inline cssText edits on the JS buttons set GAM_TOK values that match this rule; adding the class delivers the focus ring + hover.
